title: The Sterling Reservation
content: You step back into 'The Blackwood'. The warmth is artificial, smelling of expensive cologne and polished silver. It's a place designed to make people feel important—or invisible.||You walk up to the maître d'. He looks at you with the same icy disdain as before, but this time you're ready.||'I'm here for what Mr. Sterling left behind from his 8:30 PM reservation,' you say, your voice flat and certain.
